items.title: NMIH Stock Near 52-Week High, Trades at a Discount: Time to Hold?
items.description: NMI Holdings is well-positioned for growth, with higher new insurance written volume, a comprehensive reinsurance program and prudent capital deployment.

items.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $295
items.description: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $285 to $295.

items.title: Q3 Earnings Roundup: Travelers (NYSE:TRV) And The Rest Of The Property & Casualty Insurance Segment
items.description: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q3. Today, we are looking at property & casualty insurance stocks, starting with Travelers (NYSE:TRV).
